auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Sign in to check on your block.
auth.joinSubtitle: Join your block in just 2 minutes.
auth.pendingMessage: Your address is being verified and you'll be assigned to your neighborhood shortly.
auth.pendingWhileWaiting: You'll receive a notification once your neighborhood coordinator has confirmed your address.
auth.verifyAddressDescription: We need your address to connect you with your neighborhood block.

errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.networkUnavailable: No internet connection. Please check your network.
errors.resetFailed: Couldn't send reset email. Check your email address and try again.

reset.title: Create New Password
reset.successMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
reset.expiredLink: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
reset.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sync.neverSynced: No data available. Connect to the internet to get started.

emergency.imAliveDescription: Your {{count}} designated contact will receive an SMS text and email letting them know you're safe. Works offline — messages are queued and sent automatically as soon as your device reconnects.
emergency.imAliveDescriptionPlural: Your {{count}} designated contacts will each receive an SMS text and email letting them know you're safe. Works offline — messages are queued and sent automatically as soon as your device reconnects.
emergency.imAliveQueued: Status saved. Will send when connected.
emergency.drillBanner: DRILL IN PROGRESS — This is not a real emergency
emergency.drillComplete: Drill complete. ReadyBlock is back to normal.
emergency.drillStarted: Drill started. All members have been notified.

household.title: My Household
household.contactsDescription: Add an emergency contact outside your neighborhood who can be reached if local phones are down.
household.contactPhoneOrEmail: At least a phone number or email is required.
household.resourcesDescription: Do you have any of these available to share in an emergency?
household.languagesDescription: What languages are spoken in your household?
household.needsConsent: This information helps your coordinator prepare for emergencies. You choose who can see it.
household.medicalEquipment: Depends on medical equipment (oxygen, dialysis, etc.)
household.checkOnMeFirst: Check on me first in an emergency
household.sharingDecideLater: Skip for now — I'll decide later

coordinator.drillBlockedDuringEmergency: Drills cannot be started during an active emergency.

map.unassigned: Your address is outside the current coverage area. A coordinator will assign you to the nearest block.

admin.name: Name
admin.preparednessReportDesc: Generate a city-wide preparedness overview with scores and coverage gaps.
admin.dataExportDesc: Export neighborhood data as CSV or JSON for external analysis.

empty.coordinatorDashboard: Your block is ready to be mapped. Send your first invitation.
empty.residentMap: Welcome to {{block}}. As neighbors join, you'll see your block come to life.
empty.resourceInventory: Do you have a generator, tools, or supplies to share? Adding resources helps your whole block.
empty.welfareChecks: No active emergency. Your welfare check list will appear here when needed.

onboarding.step_yourName_desc: So your neighbors know who you are.
onboarding.step_address_desc: We'll match you with your neighborhood block.
onboarding.step_basics_desc: Helps your coordinator plan for everyone.
onboarding.step_contacts_desc: Someone outside your neighborhood who can be reached if local phones are down.
onboarding.step_pets_desc: Pets need to be accounted for in emergencies too.
onboarding.step_resources_desc: Anything you could lend neighbors in a crisis?
onboarding.step_skills_desc: Any professional or volunteer skills that could help in an emergency?
onboarding.skillsDescription: Check any that apply to anyone in your household.
onboarding.step_languages_desc: Helps coordinators connect neighbors who can help translate.
onboarding.step_needs_desc: Optional and private. Helps your coordinator check on the right people first.
onboarding.complete: You're all set! Welcome to your block.

hero.title: Know your neighbors. Know your resources. Know you're not alone.
hero.subtitle: ReadyBlock connects your household with your block so when emergencies hit, no one is on their own.

features.title: Built by neighbors. For neighbors.
features.subtitle: Everything you need to make your block more resilient — before, during, and after an emergency.

map.title: Map Your Block
map.description: See who's on your street, what resources are nearby, and how ready your neighborhood is.

resources.title: Share Resources
resources.description: Generators, medical skills, chainsaws, shelter space — know what your block has before you need it.

checkIn.title: Check In Fast
checkIn.description: One tap tells your contacts you're safe. In an emergency, every second counts.

step1.title: Register your household
step1.description: Your address, your people, your pets — 2 minutes.

step2.title: Add resources & skills
step2.description: What you can share, what you know. Your block gets stronger.

step3.title: Know your block
step3.description: See your neighbors, track readiness, be prepared together.

community.title: Built in Asheville. Ready for anything.
community.description: After Hurricane Helene showed us what neighbors can do, ReadyBlock was born. Because the best emergency plan is knowing who's on your block.

dashboard.noNeighborhood: Not yet assigned to a neighborhood
dashboard.getStartedDescription: Complete these steps so your block coordinator knows how to help you in an emergency.

profile.name: Name
profile.resourceDetailsPlaceholder: e.g., Honda EU2200i, 50lb bag of rice

settings.notificationsDescription: Push notifications will be available once your neighborhood is set up.
settings.privacyDescription: Choose who can see your emergency needs information.

queue.signOutWarning: You have {{count}} unsent update. Signing out now means it will be lost. Stay signed in?
queue.signOutWarning_other: You have {{count}} unsent updates. Signing out now means they will be lost. Stay signed in?
